=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 9:23 - 11:2
Root: Effect.fail("boom").pipe(\n  Effect.catch((cause) => Effect.fail(new WrappedError(cause)))\n)

  [0] root {effect A=never E=WrappedError R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A="boom"} "boom"
      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]
  [3] pipeTransformation {effect A=never E=WrappedError R=never} step 1: Effect.catch
